_meta.scope: 17 base-game classes (6 starting + 11 unlockable). Excludes Jaws of the Lion and Forgotten Circles classes.
_meta.spoiler_policy: starter classes spoiler:false; the 11 unlockable classes spoiler:true. Refer to locked classes by box_symbol only in chat until unlocked.

fields.box_symbol: spoiler-safe nickname of the icon on the class box
fields.name: real class name (HIDE in chat while spoiler:true)

classes.name: Brute
classes.playstyle: Durable front-line melee tank that soaks hits while dealing reliable damage.

classes.name: Cragheart
classes.playstyle: Flexible bruiser who manipulates the battlefield with obstacles and ranged earth attacks.

classes.name: Tinkerer
classes.playstyle: Support specialist providing healing, utility gadgets and ranged crowd control.

classes.name: Scoundrel
classes.playstyle: Single-target rogue that maximizes damage by flanking enemies alongside allies.

classes.name: Spellweaver
classes.playstyle: Glass-cannon mage casting powerful fire/ice AoE spells with a tiny recovering hand.

classes.name: Mindthief
classes.playstyle: Fragile melee striker using augments, ice control and mind-manipulation to disable foes.

classes.name: Sunkeeper
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Law Bringer / Implement of Light)
classes.playstyle: Holy paladin tank with shields, healing and light-element burst damage.

classes.name: Quartermaster
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Merchant Class / Greed is Good)
classes.playstyle: Item-focused tank-support hybrid that recycles gear for flexible melee and ranged output.

classes.name: Summoner
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Eternal Wanderer / Augmented Abilities)
classes.playstyle: Commands a swarm of element-fueled summons to deal damage and control space.

classes.name: Nightshroud
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. The Thin Places / The Fall of Man)
classes.playstyle: Invisible dark-element assassin delivering devastating single-target strikes.

classes.name: Plagueherald
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Seeker of Xorn / The Perfect Poison)
classes.playstyle: Ranged debuffer layering poison and curses while controlling the air element.

classes.name: Berserker
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Pounds of Flesh / Zealot of the Blood God)
classes.playstyle: Reckless melee fighter whose damage scales as her own health drops.

classes.name: Soothsinger
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Battle Legend / A Helping Hand)
classes.playstyle: Fragile ranged bard projecting persistent song buffs and enemy-weakening debuffs.

classes.name: Doomstalker
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Take Back the Trees / Goliath Toppler)
classes.playstyle: Ranged hunter who marks enemies with Dooms for targeted high damage and summons.

classes.name: Sawbones
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. A Study of Anatomy / Piety in All Things)
classes.playstyle: Battlefield medic granting allies bonus cards, healing and situational damage.

classes.name: Elementalist
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Aberrant Slayer / Elemental Samples)
classes.playstyle: Versatile mage who generates and consumes all elements to power varied effects.

classes.name: Beast Tyrant
classes.unlock: complete a personal quest (e.g. Trophy Hunt / Fearless Stand)
classes.playstyle: Backline commander directing a tanky bear companion while supporting and summoning.
